title: Senior Teacher - Allen Career Institute - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Allen Career Institute - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
